title: Neoteck Gas Leak Detector Natural Gas Detector with Audible & Visual Alarm, Portable Gas Sniffer to Locate Combustible Gas Leak Sources Like Methane, Propane for Home-Grey
features: 【Quick and Accurate Gas Leak Detector】The natural gas detector is widely suitable for LPG, methane, ethane, propane, butane, natural gas, coal gas, gas fuel, liquefied natural gas, etc., and it will exactly pinpoint a leak, reducing the risk of gas explosion and keeping your family and property safe. It potentially reduce energy bills

【Visual & Audible Gas Alarm】The gas detector employs both visual alarm and audible alarm as fast as 0.5 seconds of detection. When the bar graph increases and the detector beeps, you know gas has been detected. The alarm increases with the amount of gas, and the LCD screen will turn red when the gas concentration is high.The system warm-up time is about 30 seconds

【Adjustable Sensitivity】This natrual gas leak detester supports High Low Sensitivity Mode: 50-500ppm, Low Sensitivity Mode: 500-3000ppm. Increase sensitivity dial to find small gas leaks. Decrease sensitivity to find larger explosive gas leaks while filtering out false alarms from background gas levels, which is much more convenient to use

【Batteries Included & Easy to Use】This gas sniffer comes with 2x AAA Batteries, so you will be able to set the detector up and have it ready as soon as you receive it. The low battery indicator will engage when battery voltage is below 2.4V. Automatic power off after 5 minutes without operation or gas detection.Detection range: 50 to 3000 ppm* (*based on Methane)

【Compact Design】 Pocket-sized with a pocket clip that allows you to carry it in your shirt pocket. It is an excellent tool for RV-ers, DIY-ers, homeowners with gas appliances, etc. It's very convenient and perfect for regular safety checks
description: Product Description Q: What is the difference between a gas monitor and a gas leak detector? A: Gas monitors are used for continuous gas leak monitoring to monitor the air state in a large space, but they are unable to pinpoint the exact leak point. The gas leak detector is used to locate the source of the gas leak. Q: Can the sensors be replaced? A: We do not sell sensors separately. If you find that the sensor is no longer working within 18 Months from the date of purchase, please get in touch with us. Previous page Next page 1 Types of Combustible Gas 2 Potential Source 3 How to set up the detector to make it ready to detect? Turn on and wait for 30 seconds to warm up. Please keep in mind that the warm-up process should be performed in a known 'clean' environment to achieve accurate results. How close does the detector need to be to detect leaking gas from a natural gas pipeline? Generally 1-5cm, depending on the severity and concentration of the gas leak. How can I tell what sensitivity the detector is currently at? When the S button light is on, the detector is in high sensitivity mode; when the S button light is off, the detector is in low sensitivity mode. Does the alarm continue until the situation is resolved? Yes, the alarm will continue to sound until the combustible gas concentration is below 5% of the lower explosive limit. Why doesn't the screen light up/can’t be turned on? Firstly, check the battery and make sure the electrodes are oriented correctly. Next, check whether the battery voltage is sufficient, and replace new batteries to see if the detector works. If the problem persists, please get in touch with us.
